chunks.title: David becomes King in Hebron
chunks.reason: Narrative of David's move to Hebron and his blessing to the men of Jabesh-gilead.

chunks.title: Ish-bosheth becomes King in Israel
chunks.reason: Narrative of Abner establishing Ish-bosheth as king and the summary of the two reigns.

chunks.title: Battle at Gibeon
chunks.reason: The full account of the confrontation between Joab and Abner, including Asahel's death and the battle's conclusion.
